title: Cobblemon:Labubu
description: Adds Labubus to cobblemon i guess....
body:
![labubu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f6e70831bb9b14a48a7a781e56696c4634d3756.png)

A cobblemon addon nobody asked for but exists anyway

# Additons

The Labubu (fairy/dark)

## Spawn Info

labubus spawn in all forest biomes and any biome with the magical tag and rarely in mountain and lush cave biomes.

you can get more info on biome tags here!!! https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Pok%C3%A9mon/Spawning/Spawn_Definitions

### How to install

You must place the zip files you installed in both your worlds datapack folder and the games resource pack folder.
